name: SHERLOCK SARS-CoV-2 (S gene)
shortDescription: Cas13a (SHERLOCK) detection of SARS-CoV-2 targeting the Spike (S) gene, with RT-RPA pre-amplification and lateral-flow or fluorescent readout. Sequences from the Zhang Lab open-access COVID-19 research protocol.

primers.name: S-RPA-Forward_v1
primers.modifications: 5' T7 promoter appended (TAATACGACTCACTATAGGG) for downstream T7 transcription to ssRNA

amplification.notes: RT-RPA isothermally amplifies the viral S-gene segment; amplicon is transcribed to ssRNA by T7 RNA polymerase for Cas13a detection.

reporter.readout: Lateral-flow strip (Milenia HybriDetect) or fluorescent plate reader
reporter.notes: Collateral cleavage of a FAM-biotin ssRNA reporter by activated LwaCas13a. The commercial reporter/lateral-flow substrate is available on request per the Zhang Lab protocol; exact reporter oligo sequence is not published.

workflowSteps.title: Extract viral RNA
workflowSteps.description: Extract total RNA from the clinical sample (e.g. QIAamp Viral RNA).

workflowSteps.title: RT-RPA amplification
workflowSteps.description: Combine sample RNA with rehydrated RPA pellet, S-RPA-Forward_v1/Reverse_v1 primers (10 uM), and MgAc. Incubate isothermally.

workflowSteps.title: T7 transcription + Cas13 detection
workflowSteps.description: Add RPA product to a Cas13 reaction containing LwaCas13a, S-crRNA_v1 (10 ng/uL), T7 RNA polymerase, rNTPs, and the reporter. Activated Cas13a trans-cleaves the reporter.

workflowSteps.title: Read result
workflowSteps.description: Dip lateral-flow strip (positive = test line) or read fluorescence.

validation.specificity: Designed for specificity to SARS-CoV-2; minimal off-target affinity to other common human coronaviruses.
validation.validatedOn: Serial dilutions of synthetic SARS-CoV-2 S-gene RNA fragments.

provenance.source: A protocol for detection of COVID-19 using CRISPR diagnostics (Zhang Lab, Broad Institute / MIT)
provenance.authors: Feng Zhang, Omar O. Abudayyeh, Jonathan S. Gootenberg
